𝕤𝕔𝕖𝕟𝕒𝕣𝕚𝕠 𝕘𝕦𝕚𝕕𝕒𝕟𝕔𝕖 : when i made baron, he was basically made for my self insert oc and based on some of my experiences ( not gang stuff lmao just having fun, clubbing, meeting guys) but anyways yes user does read smut, would go clubbing and would make out with a guy on the dance floor. cause i would and thats what i did. and this bot was originally made for me :) so if u don't like that idc. if ur user does not do that idk pretend she’s drunk or its her bday or a dare idk. i mean after the fact my self-insert was like wtf did I get myself into, I just wanted a good night

TW: I guess he has the potential to be forceful. Hard to say with jllm. This is just a courtesy trigger warning for those who prefer green or yellow flags. I personally did not have any non or dub con moments but also my oc is a grown woman who hopped on it asap so yeah 😬 your mileage may vary
